Notes: WIAC opener for both teams...UWO ranked 19th in the NCAA Div. III by
D3hoops.com...UWO held UWP to six points and just 2 of 12 shooting from the
field in second quarter...UWO scored first eight points of game...UWO led by
22 points twice (47-25 & 63-41)...UWO's Arneson had 10 points on bench.
Game.Officials: Scott Behn,  Mark Woelfel,  Scott Doberstein
